climate.usable_seasons: ~15 per run (first season dropped for spin-up)
climate.upsell_note: Site-specific analysis uses ERA5 forcing + CMIP6 ensemble

v2_changes.planting_dates: Maize/Sorghum/Sunflower moved from Oct to Apr planting. Oct planting coincided with Mediterranean wet season — allocation never bound. Apr planting hits dry summer, making irrigation genuinely water-limited.
v2_changes.loan_per_ha: Per-crop loan assumptions replacing universal AUD 4,000/ha. Cotton/Wheat higher (irrigated MDB land values). Maize/Sorghum/Sunflower lower (broadacre). SugarBeet mid-range (European intensive arable).

groundwater.reference: Skinner et al. 2016 (GW pumping, Australian irrigation)

aqueduct_integration.current_status: Static placeholder — replace with API call
aqueduct_integration.implementation: Query WRI Aqueduct 4.0 API once at sweep time for representative location (lat/lon of Tunis climate: ~33.9N, 9.5E). Store result in AQUEDUCT dict above. No other code changes required.
aqueduct_integration.api_note: Aqueduct score intentionally static in tool — demonstrates basin screening limitation regardless of whether value is real or placeholder.

website_implementation.allocation_slider: Snap to nearest 10% step OR linear interpolation between adjacent records
website_implementation.financial_sliders: Apply client-side to yields_raw: revenue = yield × price × farm_ha
